name: Horsing Around
objective: Find and decode the carousel reset code hidden in the HTML.

hints.1: Use the HTML Reader to inspect hidden parts of the page. Can you see a reset code?
hints.2: The reset code is encoded. Use the Decoder gadget to decode it. What settings should you use?
hints.3: The HTML suggests selecting the 'Caesar Shift' option in the Decoder gadget, with a '+1' shift.

success: The carousel spins back to life! Well done, Agent!
